category_sources: source_facts.description says 3D finite element grid generator; official homepage describes a 3D finite element mesh generator with CAD and post-processing.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and documentation use Gmsh.
docs_sources: Official homepage links the stable Gmsh reference manual as complete documentation including the tutorial.
repo_sources: Official homepage gives the Git clone URL for the development repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe finite-element meshing, CAD, post-processing, command-line, and language API support.
